why: CHART: uptrend HH+HL, cleared 7375 ceiling and held it with higher-low retest (7377->7382), higher closes 7380->7385, above VWAP 7371, 15m momo +0.32%. GEX CONFIRM: 7375 ceiling absorbed off the board, nearest resistance now 7450 = ~65pt air pocket overhead (no wall), floor 7320. Long the breakout into the air pocket; target 7400-7416 first, exit fast on loss of 7375/VWAP or gamma flip to pin. Positive-gamma = manage tight, cap winner.

CHART: 3rd rejection at ~7394 (7391.6/7393.5/7394.6 all sold back to 7387), pinned in 7382-7394 box, momentum dead flat. GEX: positive gamma ramped +11M->+18M since entry = pin regime dominating, air-pocket run wont travel. Breakout-run thesis invalidated, now chop; exit flat, dont bleed 0DTE theta in a strengthening pin.

CHART: rolled over off 7390 rejection, 5 red candles 7387->7358, lower lows (7360.3->7358.8), below VWAP 7375, 15m momo -0.19%. GEX CONFIRM: regime FLIPPED to negative gamma (-15M = trending/levels break = fuel), barney resistance 7370 overhead, air pocket down to strong 7310 pika floor (~48pts). WITH-regime short (vs fought-pin morning long). Target 7330-7325 above the 7310 floor, exit fast if reclaim 7370 barney or gamma flips back positive. Cap 0DTE winner.

Negative-gamma confirmation that justified the short flipped back to positive gamma and strengthened over 2 bars (-15M->+19M), 7310 floor building a wall (+30M, +2.0/min) 42pts below = trending-slide thesis invalidated; positive gamma will cushion/revert the down-move near the floor. Banking +0.09% (7358.84->7352.4) while chart still favorable, per pre-stated exit-on-gamma-flip rule. Dont round-trip a green 0DTE short once the regime edge is gone.
